items.title: NePoLaBo Live Photo Contest Announcement
items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!

For the “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live” virtual concert on December 21, 2025, we will hold a photo contest.

We invite all to take in-app photos of hololive 5th Generation “NePoLaBo” (Momosuzu Nene / Omaru Polka / Yukihana Lamy / Shishiro Botan) from various angles, and be sure to share your very best shots!

NePoLaBo Live Support Campaign: Photo Contest!

For “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live,” screenshots & social media posts are fully welcome. Share your perfect captures with us!

Top entries will be featured on the official website and receive NePoLaBo Live commemorative merch. Selected posts will also be showcased on the official X account during the contest.

1. Hide “NaviRobo” and “Usernames” in the Options menu.

2. Capture in 1920×1080 (Full HD) or higher.

3. Post your screenshots on X with the hashtags (no entry limit!):

English: #NePoLaBoHoloearthLive

Japanese: #ねぽらぼホロアースライブ

Take as many as you like! Replay the concert anytime in the 3D archive (requires purchase of the ID Holder).

Note: ・Turn “Motion Blur” off in Options (Esc key) to prevent photos from showing blur.

・In the concert venue you can use the O key shortcut to adjust the number of character models rendered and toggle other users’ effects (such as fireworks and poppers) ON/OFF. This helps reduce system load and offers more flexibility when taking photos.

items.title: Announcement: “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live” on Dec. 21
items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!

On December 21, 2025 (JST) members of hololive 5th Generation (Momosuzu Nene / Omaru Polka / Yukihana Lamy / Shishiro Botan) will hold a special virtual concert: “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live.”

Become a virtual avatar and share the same space and experience as the NePoLaBo members. With a 360° front-row seat, choose any viewpoint and get up-close for an immersive concert experience where the talents are right before you within reach.

After the show, relive the magic again with a 3D archive that fully preserves the entire concert space. All you need is a PC (Windows)—

To coincide with the event, items such as member-themed accessories, penlights, and text plates will also be sold. Additionally, as part of a support campaign for the event, we plan to hold a photo contest, countdown campaigns, and more!

Event name: “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live” Cast: Momosuzu Nene / Omaru Polka / Yukihana Lamy / Shishiro Botan

Hashtag: #NePoLaBoHoloearthLive

Date & time: Sunday, December 21, 2025 from 19:00 (JST)

About re:VISION Holoearth Live

Participating in the Holoearth Live event requires a Windows PC with Holoearth installed and a registered account, as well as the in-app item “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION ID Holder.”

Equipping your avatar with the “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION ID Holder” will grant access to the concert venue.

[Exclusive Bonus Only for Holoearth]

  • After the show, you can join a special Holoearth-exclusive segment—a unique opportunity to share the afterglow with NePoLaBo.
  • Following the first showing, relive the concert in the 3D archive, where the entire event space is preserved. Explore the event from different perspectives, take photos, and relive your favorite scenes.

Note: The 3D archive will be available from Dec 21, 2025, until January 4, 2026, according to the designated schedule.

Note: Holoearth is available only on Windows. In the concert venue you can use the O key shortcut to adjust the number of character models rendered and toggle other users’ effects (such as fireworks and poppers) ON/OFF. This helps reduce system load and offers more flexibility when taking photos.

NePoLaBo Live re:VISION ID Holder

(Only one purchase per account.)

・Participate in the “MC Special Segment” after the show. ・Relive the show with the 3D archive afterward.

・This is the same item included in the special sets below.

・1,500 HoloCoin (Premium)

Bundled sets of items for cheering on NePoLaBo members will also be for sale. This value set lets you purchase items such as penlights and mascot character hair accessories together.

4,500 HoloCoin (Premium)

・NePoLaBo Live re:VISION ID Holder (single purchase only)

・Penlight Momosuzu Nene Type A (single purchase only)

・Nekko Hair Accessory

・NePoLaBo Live Celebration T Momosuzu Nene Ver. (Signed)

・NePoLaBo Live re:VISION ID Holder (single purchase only)

・Penlight Omaru Polka Type A (single purchase only)

・ZA-IN Hair Accessory

・NePoLaBo Live Celebration T Omaru Polka Ver. (Signed)

・NePoLaBo Live re:VISION ID Holder (single purchase only)

・Penlight Yukihana Lamy Type A (single purchase only)

・Yukimin Hair Accessory

・NePoLaBo Live Celebration T Yukihana Lamy Ver. (Signed)

Cheer Set Shishiro Botan Set details ・NePoLaBo Live re:VISION ID Holder (single purchase only)

・Penlight Shishiro Botan Type A (single purchase only)

・SSRB Hair Accessory

・NePoLaBo Live Celebration T Shishiro Botan Ver. (Signed)

NOTE: The signed T-shirt versions are only included in the Cheer Sets.

For items already purchased that are included in Cheer Sets prior to purchasing a set, the price of the previously purchased items will be deducted from the set’s total purchase price.

Holoearth Live Event Time Schedule

First showing: Sunday, December 21, 2025 from 19:00 (JST)

3D archive period: Dec 21, 2025 21:00 (JST) – Jan 4, 2026 23:59 (JST)

Daily showtimes (JST): (1) 08:00~ (2) 12:00~ (3) 19:00~ (4) 21:00~ (5) 23:00~

  • This performance is pre-recorded.
  • Screenshots from the entire performance may be posted on social media.
  • Videos from the free portion (the first song and its MC) may be uploaded to YouTube. For other social media platforms, video posts are limited to within 30 seconds with no audio.
  • The 3D archive may be played via the event venue screens for activities such as talent watch parties.

Due to the nature of this content, which allows users to freely control the camera, it is produced in accordance with international safety standards and guidelines regarding visual display (such as flicker frequency and changes in brightness levels).

However, certain user actions may still produce unexpectedly strong visual stimuli. In particular, individuals with a history of photosensitivity (such as photosensitive epilepsy or light-induced sensitivity), those who are sleep-deprived or unwell, and minors should avoid the actions listed below and exercise caution when viewing this content.

Rapid and intense camera movements—such as panning quickly from side to side, tilting up and down, or repeatedly zooming in and out—may cause fast motion across the screen and strong flickering.

Sudden Approaches to Light Sources Suddenly moving the camera close to bright lights used in the live performance (such as stage lighting, lasers, fireworks, or effects), or filling the screen with a bright light source, may cause abrupt changes in brightness.

If you experience strong visual stimulation, dizziness, nausea, convulsions, or any vision abnormalities while viewing this content, stop immediately, look away from the screen, and take a break. If symptoms do not improve, promptly seek medical attention.

Please view this content at your own risk with thorough understanding of the above potential hazards. We kindly ask for your understanding and cooperation to ensure safe usage.

Mirrored streaming of this performance is strictly prohibited. Uploading videos of the paid portion of this performance (after the first song and its MC) to social media or YouTube is prohibited.

Watch via Streaming Ticket

SPWN, ZAIKO

Dec 11 (Thu), 2025 22:00 – Jan 21 (Wed), 2025 22:00 (JST)

Until Wednesday, January 21, 2026 at 23:59 (JST)

3,500 JPY (tax inclusive)

  • This will be a video stream provided through SPWN and ZAIKO. Holoearth’s in-app features will not be available.
  • The archive will be available for viewing once it is prepared following the performance. During the archive viewing period the show can be viewed any number of times.
  • As soon as the archive viewing period ends the archive footage will no longer be accessible.
  • An additional handling fee of 220 JPY will apply when purchasing this ticket.
YouTube Free-to-View Segment

The opening portion of the live show will be streamed for free on YouTube. Videos from the free segment (the first song and its MC) may be posted on YouTube. For other social media platforms, video posts are limited to 30 seconds or less with no audio.

Limited-Time Digital Merchandise

・NePoLaBo Live Celebration T Momosuzu Nene Ver. (No Signature)

・NePoLaBo Live Celebration T Omaru Polka Ver. (No Signature)

・NePoLaBo Live Celebration T Yukihana Lamy Ver. (No Signature)

・NePoLaBo Live Celebration T Shishiro Botan Ver. (No Signature)

・Nekko Hair Accessory ・Yukimin Hair Accessory

・Penlight Momosuzu Nene Live ver.

・Penlight Omaru Polka Live ver.

・Penlight Yukihana Lamy Live ver.

・Penlight Shishiro Botan Live ver.

Note:

Penlights are held in both hands when used.

These items cannot be used in the Simulation Room or My Space.

・Momosuzu Nene re:VISION Outfit Acrylic Stand (L)

・Omaru Polka re:VISION Outfit Acrylic Stand (L)

・Yukihana Lamy re:VISION Outfit Acrylic Stand (L)

・Shishiro Botan re:VISION Outfit Acrylic Stand (L)

・NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Key Visual Acrylic Panel

・For Momosuzu Nene ・For Yukihana Lamy

New Items for Hyping Up the Show!

From Dec 11 (Thu), 2025 at 21:30

(Schedule is subject to change.)

・Penlight Momosuzu Nene Type A

・Penlight Omaru Polka Type A

・Penlight Yukihana Lamy Type A

・Penlight Shishiro Botan Type A

Note:

Penlights are held in both hands when used.

These items cannot be used in the Simulation Room or My Space.

・Momosuzu Nene Text Plate 1 × 3

(Nenechi / Kon-Nene~! / Waku Waku! / Energy Drink! / HAAAN)

・Omaru Polka Text Plate 1 × 3

(Polka / Omarun / Where’s Polka? / Otsu-Pol / POLMAO)

・Yukihana Lamy Text Plate 1 × 3

(Lamy-chan / Kon-Lamy~ / Otsu-Lamy~ / Can’t love! / Stooop)

・Shishiro Botan Text Plate 1 × 3

(Shishiron / GG / La-lion♪ / Sasu-Shishi / poi)

・NePoLaBo Momosuzu Nene Pose

・NePoLaBo Omaru Polka Pose

・NePoLaBo Yukihana Lamy Pose

・NePoLaBo Shishiro Botan Pose

From Dec 18 (Thu), 2025 after maintenance.

(Schedule is subject to change.)

・Christmas Poppers

Concert event shirts will take shape in the real world. The Live Celebration T-shirts, designed by NePoLaBo in Holoearth, are now available on Amazon!

They are unique items that connect two different worlds: the virtual and the real.

items.title: “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live” Special Website Launch!!
items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
We launched a special website for the upcoming “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live”!

The official English hashtag is #NePoLaBoHoloearthLive.

Here, you can view information and important notices about the performance, including how to participate and more. Please check each page for details.

We will also be sharing new updates in the future, so be sure to bookmark the site!

items.title: NePoLaBo Major Announcement in Holoearth on Dec. 11
items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!

On the day of the event, NePoLaBo members will appear in Holoearth as themselves and deliver a special announcement. (Please note this announcement will be featured in Japanese.)

“NePoLaBo Major Announcement in Holoearth”

(This is a revised date & time.)

Anyone can join in the festivities for free by downloading and installing Holoearth.

(Note: Holoearth is available only for Windows.)

items.title: Regarding “NePoLaBo Major Announcement” and “holoX Arrival Party”
items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
A “NePoLaBo Major Announcement” that was scheduled for November 28, and “holoX Arrival Party,” which was scheduled for December 2, will be postponed following further discussions. We apologize for the inconvenience and concern this may cause to everyone who had been looking forward to these announcements.

We will provide updated schedules as soon as they are decided. Thank you for your understanding.

items.title: Ver. 1.1.11 Release Notes
items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
This is the Holoearth Management Team. Holoearth was updated on November 25.

■ Removal of NPC characters Certain NPCs in Focal Square and Alternative City were removed.

items.title: “hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE Chromatic Future” in Holoearth Announcement
items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!

From November 22nd (Sat), 2025 (PT) “hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE Chromatic Future” will be streamed in Holoearth! During the event period the of “Chromatic Future” will be available for viewing in the specially prepared viewing area.

Vestia Zeta and Moona Hoshinova of hololive Indonesia will also arrive in Holoearth on November 24th and November 26th, respectively!

(Schedules are subject to change.)

Anyone can join in the festivities by downloading and installing Holoearth and purchasing the ID Card Case “Chromatic Future” Ver. item in-app.

(Note: Holoearth is available only on Windows.)

“Chromatic Future” Watch Parties in Holoearth

We will hold watch parties where the full “hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE Chromatic Future” concert can be watched in Holoearth in the specially prepared “hololive Indonesia LIVE Viewing Area”!

Pacific Time between November 22nd (Sat) and December 3rd (Wed) starting daily at: 02:00 PT 06:00 PT

Note: December 3rd at 19:00 is the final showing.

“hololive Indonesia LIVE Viewing Area” in Holoearth.

Accessing the Watch Party Viewing Area

・Playback timing may vary depending on your system environment. ・To adjust the volume of content playing in the hololive Indonesia LIVE Viewing Area, go to Options (Esc) and adjust the “Media” volume setting.

・Taking screenshots and posting them & impressions on social media is allowed.

・Posting videos without audio up to 30 sec. long on social media is allowed.

・The viewing area cannot be entered without purchasing the “ID Card Case “Chromatic Future” Ver.” item.

・Purchasing the “ID Card Case “Chromatic Future” Ver.” item requires HoloCoin (Premium).

・Purchasing the “ID Card Case “Chromatic Future” Ver.” item allows entry to the viewing area any number of times.

・For the Holoearth streams of Moona Hoshinova and Vestia Zeta, only the free portion of the event will be viewable on YouTube.

A new item will be available at the hololive production official shop in HOLOEARTH. Note: Purchase of this item is required to enter the viewing area.

750 HoloCoin (Regular) (1,500 JPY equivalent (tax inclusive).)

(Schedule is subject to change.)

・ID Card Case “Chromatic Future” Ver.

Special hololive Indonesia-themed penlights will also be added, which can be used with gestures to show support in Holoearth!

November 21st (Fri) 05:00 (PT)

(Schedule is subject to change.)

・Penlight Ayunda Risu ver.

・Penlight Moona Hoshinova ver.

・Penlight Airani Iofifteen ver.

・Penlight Kureiji Ollie ver.

・Penlight Anya Melfissa ver.

・Penlight Pavolia Reine ver.

・Penlight Vestia Zeta ver.

・Penlight Kaela Kovalskia ver.

・Penlight Kobo Kanaeru ver.

Note: These penlights are held in both hands when used.

These items cannot be used in the Simulation Room, My Room, or My Shop.

Text plate items will also be added that include phrases related to hololive Indonesia talents.

November 21st (Fri) 05:00 (PT)

(Schedule is subject to change.)

・Text Plate Ayunda Risu 1 x 3

(Risu / Risu-chan / Hewrroo / Brrrr / Ohawroo)

・Text Plate Moona Hoshinova 1 x 3

(Moona / Moona (JP) / Moon Moon / MONYAA / Otsumoona)

・Text Plate Airani Iofifteen 1 x 3

(Iofi / Iofi (JP) / Yopi / Otsulonpas / Obisa!)

・Text Plate Kureiji Ollie 1 x 3

(Ollie / Ollie-chan / OTSUCRAZY!! / OHAYOLLIE!! / ZOMBANWA!!!)

・Text Plate Anya Melfissa 1 x 3

(Anya / Anya (JP) / ANYAA / Otsukeris / Yahho—!)

・Text Plate Pavolia Reine 1 x 3

(Reine Ojou-sama / Reine / Reine-chan / Gokigenyou / Ganba-Reine!)

・Text Plate Vestia Zeta 1 x 3

(Zeta / Zeta-chan / Zecretary / o7 / Otsuzeta!)

items.title: Ver. 1.1.10 Release Notes
items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
This is the Holoearth Management Team.

Holoearth was updated on November 19th, 2025.

■ Voice chat mirroring test release During events, users will be able hear the voice chat of hololive production talents even if they are not in the same Room via the new test version of the “Voice Mirroring” feature.

Applicable areas: ・Focal Square ・Celestial Arena ・Celestial Beach

■ New support category for the Holoearth launcher options In cases where Holoearth does not install correctly, users can now check the relevant error code.

Including this error code when contacting support will allow us to assist more smoothly.

1. Avatar Customization Options

■ Fixed an issue where “Graceful Eyes” would be displayed incorrectly in purchase history.

■ Fixed an issue where the World Quests menu would not open with the U key.

■ Other minor fixes to the World Quests system.

■ Minor fixes for the launcher.

items.title: AZKi SOLO LiVE 2025 Support Campaign in Holoearth Announcement
items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!

From November 12th (Wed), 2025 we are holding a support campaign for AZKi SOLO LiVE 2025 “Departure”!

During the campaign period we will feature a street takeover with the “Departure” key visual and sell commemorative Holoearth merchandise, including a digital version of the concert T-shirt. The background music in the area will also change to “Mirai Campanella” and “from A to Z (Re: arrange ver.).”

Show your support in Holoearth and post your images with #Holoearth!

(Schedule is subject to change.)

Anyone can join in the festivities for free by downloading and installing Holoearth.

(Note: Holoearth is available only for Windows.)

A street takeover featuring the “Departure” key visual, as well as the Re:Start Re:Birth album cover illustration will take place in Alternative City. Users will also be able to take photos with a life-sized standee of AZKi. The background music in the area will also be changed to “Mirai Campanella” until November 20th at 17:59 (JST) and then to “from A to Z (Re: arrange ver.)” until the end of the campaign period.

Street Takeover BGM Period:

“from A to Z (Re: arrange ver.)” (Schedule is subject to change.)

“Departure” Commemorative Items

AZKi SOLO LiVE “Departure” T-Shirt

A new T-shirt will be added to the hololive production official shop in HOLOEARTH. Enjoy this new concert T-shirt in Holoearth!

(Schedule is subject to change.)

・AZKi SOLO LiVE “Departure” T-Shirt

A new acrylic panel furniture item featuring the AZKi SOLO LiVE 2025 “Departure” key visual  will be added for decorating users’ spaces!

Note: The owner of a Simulation Room, My Room, or My Shop may place this item.

When purchased the item will be sent to the “Special Items” inventory in worlds where it can be placed.

(Schedule is subject to change.)

・AZKi “Departure” Key Visual Acrylic Panel

Special AZKi-themed penlights will also be added, which can be used with gestures to show support in Holoearth!

(Schedule is subject to change.)

・Penlight AZKi Type A

Note: These penlights are held in both hands when used.

These items cannot be used in the Simulation Room, My Room, or My Shop.

These are the penlights that were available for purchase for the AZKi Arrival Festival.

Text plate items will also be added that include phrases related to AZKi.

・AZKi Text Plate 1 x 3

(AZKichi / AZ-chan / Kon-AZKi~ / Otsu-AZKi~ / Let’s Go!)

Note: Text plates are consumable items.

These items cannot be used in the Simulation Room, My Room, or My Shop.

These are the text plates that were available for purchase for the AZKi Arrival Festival.

items.title: [Archive] Advent’s Arrival Fest Held in Holoearth on Nov. 6 PT
items.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
items.content:
Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!

On Thursday, November 6th, 2025 (PT), the members of hololive English -Advent- visited Holoearth as their own custom avatar models for a special “Holoearth Advent’s Arrival Fest” event.

Streams of the event are archived for all those who are interested in viewing.
